subject: Geography
title: The Thai Cave Rescue
description: A quick win: understand The Thai Cave Rescue.

hook.text: In 2018, 12 boys and their coach were trapped in a flooded Thai cave for 18 days.

buildup.text: Monsoon rains flooded the Tham Luang cave system, trapping them 4 km inside.

discovery.text: British cave divers found them alive on a ledge after swimming through murky tunnels.

twist.text: Each boy was sedated and guided through flooded passages by divers—a plan never tried before.

climax.text: All 13 were rescued alive in an operation involving over 10,000 people from 17 countries.

punchline.text: A cave took them. The world brought them back.

quiz.question: How were the Thai boys extracted from the flooded cave?
options: Sedated and guided through flooded passages by divers
The cave was pumped completely dry
A tunnel was drilled from above
